title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Major banks are deploying Claude across their organizations. A virtual briefing event featured financial services leaders discussing their implementations and use cases of Claude.
writeup: This video is a recording of a virtual briefing event from Anthropic's Claude channel focused on financial services. Leaders from major banks discuss how they are deploying Claude across their organizations, covering specific implementations and use cases. It matters because it documents how large language models are being adopted within the financial sector by institutions describing their own deployments rather than vendor projections.
